format: DCF-SSTV L2 framing v1 (adapter over the 17-byte DeModFrame quantum)
spec: seq = image_id[15:11] | frag_idx[10:0]; frag_idx 0 = [len_hi,len_lo,format_id,flags]; frag_idx 1..N = 4 payload bytes (last zero-padded); type=DATA(0), version=1
theorem: L2 framing is a fixed bit-placement adapter over the certified DeModFrame; matching these framing + reassembly vectors pins the C, Rust, Go and Node implementations to this reference.  The descriptor format_id and flags are opaque to L2, so the framing vectors are invariant to the format/flag choice.
